# Support-needs assessment (DRAFT) — ****4417

Reference: vcs-4417-CC-8842 | Channel: phone | Signals: 3 | Readiness: signals_mapped

## Observed signals
- [S1] "I lost my husband last month and I'm still not really coping with the paperwork" — Life events (bereavement) — transcript:call=CC-8842;line=12
- [S2] "I'm struggling to keep up with the repayments since his income stopped" — Resilience (financial_difficulty_arrears) — transcript:call=CC-8842;line=28
- [S3] "I don't use online banking and the letters you send are hard for me to read" — Capability (digital_exclusion) — transcript:call=CC-8842;line=41

## Possible support needs
- Life events: signalled by S1 (current context, not a diagnosis)
- Resilience: signalled by S2 (current context, not a diagnosis)
- Capability: signalled by S3 (current context, not a diagnosis)

## Suggested accommodations
- ACC-COMMS-ALT — Alternative communication format (large print, post, email) (supports: S3)
- ACC-EXTERNAL-SUPPORT-SIGNPOST — Signpost approved external support organizations (supports: S1)
- ACC-EXTRA-TIME — Allow extra time; avoid pressuring decisions (supports: S1)
- ACC-FORBEARANCE-SIGNPOST — Signpost the approved financial-difficulty / forbearance process (supports: S2)

## Suggested referral
- Primary route: internal-vulnerability-specialist — Multiple or sensitive support signals — route to a trained specialist.; additional: financial-difficulty-team, external-support-signpost

## Consent and approvals
- Special-category data involved: False; consent status: not_required
- Human review required before anything is shared, recorded, or referred: True
- System-of-record change: proposed (applied: False)

## What this is not
- Not a diagnosis, not a capacity determination, not advice, and not a decision to limit service. A human reviews and an authorized colleague acts.
